title: Attention as routing
summary: Attention lets each token build a context-sensitive mixture of information from other tokens.
body_html: In a transformer, attention is a learned routing operation. A token forms queries, keys, and values, then uses compatibility scores to decide which other token representations should influence its next representation. This is one reason transformers can model long-range dependencies without processing text strictly left to right.
key_points: Attention routes information between token representations.
Queries and keys score relevance; values carry content.
The mechanism is central, but it is not the whole model.
outcome: You can describe attention without treating it as magic memory.
